tests.scenario: Validate diverse story options for relaxation and sleep aid within the first 30 days of use
steps: Launch the application and simulate 30 days of use
Navigate to the relaxation and sleep aid section
Retrieve and count the number of diverse story options available
tests.expected_result: The system provides a minimum of 50 diverse story options for relaxation and sleep aid

tests.scenario: Validate the system provides a minimum of 50 diverse story options for relaxation and sleep aid
steps: Launch the app and navigate to the relaxation and sleep aid section
Retrieve the list of available story options
Count the number of unique story options
tests.expected_result: The system provides at least 50 unique story options for relaxation and sleep aid

tests.scenario: Validate video streaming uptime for multiple users
steps: Simulate 100 concurrent users streaming video content for 1 hour
Monitor and record the number of users experiencing video interruptions
Calculate the percentage of users with uninterrupted video streaming
tests.expected_result: At least 95% of users stream video content without interruption

tests.scenario: Validate video streaming uptime for a large number of users
steps: Simulate 1000 concurrent users streaming video content for 1 hour
Monitor and record the number of users experiencing video interruptions
Calculate the percentage of users streaming without interruption
tests.expected_result: At least 95% of users stream video content without interruption

tests.scenario: Access relaxation content without subscription or payment
steps: Launch the application
Navigate to the relaxation content section
Select a relaxation content item (e.g., a meditation video or calming music track)
tests.expected_result: The selected relaxation content item plays without prompting for subscription or payment details

tests.scenario: Access relaxation content without subscription or payment
steps: Launch the application
Navigate to the relaxation content section
Select a relaxation content item (e.g. a meditation video)
tests.expected_result: The selected relaxation content item plays without prompting for subscription or payment details

steps: Login to the system
Navigate to the search function
Enter a valid search query for a sleep story
Initiate the search
Measure the response time
tests.expected_result: The search results are displayed within 3 seconds

steps: Login to the system
Navigate to the search function
Enter a valid search query for a sleep story
Record the time taken for the search results to load
Repeat steps 3-4 for a total of 100 searches
tests.expected_result: At least 90% of searches return results within 3 seconds

tests.scenario: Validate availability of free relaxation meditation sessions
steps: Launch the application and navigate to the meditation sessions section
Verify that there is a section or category for free relaxation meditation sessions
Count the number of free relaxation meditation sessions available without a paid subscription
tests.expected_result: There are at least 20 free relaxation meditation sessions available without requiring a paid subscription

tests.scenario: Validate availability of free relaxation meditation sessions
steps: Launch the application and navigate to the meditation sessions section
Identify and count the number of free relaxation meditation sessions available
Verify that no payment or subscription is required to access these sessions
